tasks.title: Summarize product feedback cluster
tasks.user_message: Summarize the top three themes from the latest support notes.
context: 25 support notes are attached in the internal system.
The answer should be concise and group feedback by theme.

tasks.title: Draft a safety escalation recommendation
tasks.user_message: Review the incident summary and recommend whether it should be escalated.
context: The incident involved an attempted prompt injection.
No customer data exposure was observed.

tasks.title: Respond to API migration question
tasks.user_message: Help the user migrate from a deprecated endpoint to the current API surface.
context: The user needs a migration answer with concrete next steps.
A good response includes both the replacement endpoint and validation guidance.
